NACS798 Master's Non-Thesis Research (1-3 Credits)

Individual research course for NACS non-thesis MS degree

Restriction: Must be in Neurosciences and Cognitive Sciences (Doctoral) program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

NACS799 Master's Thesis Research (1-3 Credits)

Individualized research course for NACS thesis MS degree
